docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 100.00 - SERVED FEB-13-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BULICHI, ERIK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEVIN, DAVID DBA CITIZEN HOUND, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BULICHI, ERIK $564.20 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $694.20 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $564.20 FILED BY LEVIN, DAVID DBA CITIZEN HOUND, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT BULICHI, ERIK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-28-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-28-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF DAVID LEVIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.
